---
title: 'Rise of the Ottoman Empire'
date: '2012-02-15T17:44:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2034899365720074507'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/rise-of-ottoman-empire.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Studies'
  - 'Prophecy'
---

<br />Turkey is poised to take it's role as the new leader of the Middle East. This is rise of the Ottoman Empire. See how this plays into these last days movements.<br /><br /><ul><li><a href="http://www.aljazeera.com/programmes/empire/2011/06/201161682640911172.html">http://www.aljazeera.com/programmes/empire/2011/06/201161682640911172.html</a></li></ul><ul><li><a href="http://www.forbes.com/2009/06/02/ahmet-davutoglu-turkey-obama-opinions-contributors-ottoman-empire.html">http://www.forbes.com/2009/06/02/ahmet-davutoglu-turkey-obama-opinions-contributors-ottoman-empire.html</a></li></ul><ul><li><a href="http://www.thestar.com/news/article/1084667">http://www.thestar.com/news/article/1084667</a></li></ul><br /><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="http://www.youtube.com/embed/5fE4beY8LjU" width="420"></iframe><br /><br /><br /><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="http://www.youtube.com/embed/28rAX_fBn4M" width="560"></iframe><br /><br /><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="http://www.youtube.com/embed/tezXFphvYkU" width="420"></iframe>
